nodes.name: Code Give Correct Name to File
HTTP Request Get Image for File
Prepare Thumbnail
nodes.notes: Converts the incoming binary field from data to thumbnail, renames the file to cover.jpg, and sets its MIME type to image/jpeg. This is typically used to attach an album cover image to an audio message before sending it to Telegram.

nodes.name: Execute Command Delete file from Server

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=❌ Song not found.

Unfortunately, this track is not available in our library and could not be downloaded.

parameters.content:
This code processes a Telegram callback query (when a user clicks an inline button).

Used in a music flow bot — when a user clicks a track button, this extracts the track_id and passes it to the download workflow.

This is a preparatory node — it takes the track_id from the callback parser and builds the API URLs needed to download the track.

const parseNode = $('Parse dz callback').item.json;	Gets data from the previous node
const trackId = parseNode.track_id;	Extracts the Deezer track ID
const chatId = parseNode.chat_id;	Gets chat ID for sending the response
deezer_track_url	Builds Deezer API URL for track metadata
songlink_url	Builds Song.link API URL to get streaming links (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, etc.)

This is a stream URL resolver — it takes track data from Deezer and Song.link APIs, finds the best available streaming source, and prepares everything for downloading.
This code renames the downloaded audio file and prepares cover art for sending to Telegram.
This code prepares cover art thumbnail and adds track metadata to the audio file before sending to Telegram.

main.node: Code Give Correct Name to File
HTTP Request Get Image for File
Execute Command Delete file from Server
